title: NPC full-auto cadence unscaled — guards fire ~3x player under FireRateAuthentic (FID-0056 port-half)
repro: chrlvFireWeaponRelated (0x7F02D734) gates guard full-auto on self->firecount[hand]++ (once per AI tick) % bondwalkItemGetAutomaticFiringRate(item); FID-0056 tick-scaled the player's identical field_88C%%rate gate behind Input.FireRateAuthentic (default ON) but left the guard gate unscaled, so guards fire ~3x the player's authentic cadence at locked 60Hz. Repro: sustain a guard machinegun on Dam, count gate-fires per N ticks fix-ON vs fix-OFF.

history.note: P1a/D2 from docs/design/FIDELITY_REVIEW_AND_PLAN_2026-07-10.md. Port-half of the FID-0056 parity skew: retail gated BOTH player and guard on the same per-rendered-frame counter (~15-30fps); the port's locked-60Hz loop advances both 3x too fast. FID-0056 fixed only the player, introducing a player-vs-guard balance skew. D2 (locked): fix symmetrically behind the SAME flag. chrlvFireWeaponRelated is a matched decomp C body (no #else stub); firecount is u8 firecount[2] @ bondtypes.h:2380; g_ClockTimer available in chrlv.c.

Root-caused vs matched decomp body chrlvFireWeaponRelated (0x7F02D734): guard firecount%%auto_rate gate = same per-rendered-frame model FID-0056 fixed for the player; port 60Hz advances it ~3x too fast. Measured on dam_forward_30s (guard chr=6 KF7 rate=3): within-burst inter-shot interval OFF=3 frames -> ON=9 frames = exactly 3.0x. Divergence + divisor-only-mirror rationale in derivation.

Fix committed d7a5849: divisor-only symmetric mirror in chrlvFireWeaponRelated behind Input.FireRateAuthentic (eff_rate = fireRateEffectiveAutoRate(auto_rate, authentic, frame_cost)). Shared FID-0056 helper reused; firecount++ kept verbatim (retail-ungated). GE007_TRACE_GUARD_AUTOFIRE counter added.

Landed. Both-sides evidence (dam_forward_30s, guard chr=6 KF7 rate=3): within-burst inter-shot interval OFF=3 -> ON=9 frames = exactly 3.0x (eff_rate 3->9); default sim-hash 95944e22->11f0b8ef, opt-out restores 95944e22 byte-identical. Player path untouched (gun.c unchanged; dam_combat_guard6 hash 3c89 unchanged both flags). Regression lane port_guard_fire_rate_symmetry_smoke (commit 5f6d173) PASS at HEAD; fail-on-revert PROVEN (divisor neutered -> ON interval collapses to 3 == OFF -> CADENCE FAIL exit 1). Baseline re-record 91320c1 (tape_regression PASS). ENV_FLAGS regen bca507f (env_reference_current green). verify_all all-tiers in progress.
